messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
give example on insomina api terster body json

Sure! Here is an example of a JSON request body that you can use in Insomnia API tester:

```json
{
    "name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john.doe@example.com",
    "age": 30
}
```

You can copy and paste this JSON request body into the body section of your request in Insomnia API tester.
